title: Patching Array
hints: Focus on the range [1, reach] that is currently coverable. How does adding a new number extend this range?
Maintain a variable 'reach' representing the maximum continuous sum achievable so far. If the next number in nums is <= reach + 1, it extends the range.
If the next number is too large, you must add the smallest missing number, which is reach + 1, to maximize the new range efficiently.
